response.title: Customer Experience Curator
response.description: As a Customer Experience Curator, you will be at the forefront of enhancing the customer journey in our retail locations. This unique role combines elements of customer service, data analysis, and visual merchandising to create an immersive shopping experience. You will collaborate with various teams to gather insights, design engaging displays, and leverage technology to improve customer interactions. If you are passionate about retail and eager to innovate, this is the perfect role for you.

required_skills: Basic proficiency in data analysis tools (e.g., Excel, Google Analytics)
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Ability to use design software (e.g., Canva, Adobe Spark)
Understanding of customer behavior and market trends
Experience with social media platforms for engagement strategy
preferred_skills: Familiarity with customer feedback tools (e.g., SurveyMonkey, Typeform)
Understanding of retail technology applications (e.g., mobile payment systems)
Experience in event planning or coordination
requirements.education: High School Diploma or equivalent; coursework in marketing, design, or business preferred
